mapper.select: select ec.id,ec.title,ec.price,ec.lesson_num lessonNum, ec.cover,et.`name` teacherName, es1.title subjectLevelOne, es2.title subjectLevelTwo from edu_course ec left JOIN edu_teacher et on et.id=ec.teacher_id left JOIN edu_subject es1 on ec.subject_parent_id=es1.id left join edu_subject es2 on ec.subject_id=es2.id WHERE ec.id=#{id}

select ec.id,ec.title,CONVERT(ec.price, DECIMAL(8,2)) AS price,ec.lesson_num lessonNum, ec.cover, ec.buy_count AS buyCount, ec.view_count AS viewCount, et.id teacherId, et.`name` teacherName, et.intro, et.avatar, cd.description, es1.id AS subjectLevelOneId, es1.title subjectLevelOne, es2.title AS subjectLevelTwo, es2.title subjectLevelTwo from edu_course ec LEFT JOIN edu_course_description cd ON ec.id = cd.id left JOIN edu_teacher et on et.id=ec.teacher_id left JOIN edu_subject es1 on ec.subject_parent_id=es1.id left join edu_subject es2 on ec.subject_id=es2.id WHERE ec.id=#{id}
